_comment: Cursor hooks. Copy to .cursor/hooks.json. CLAUDE_HARNESS=cursor switches context-injection JSON shapes. Schema matches Claude Code CLI v2.1+ (nested hooks array with type:command). Cursor's PreToolUse contract may differ — verify hook fires before relying on it.

UserPromptSubmit._comment: Optional workflow-state hint for long workflows. The script exits silently unless .skill-workflow-state exists.

PreToolUse._comment: Optional gate on rules/agent-behavior.md edits. Remove this matcher block to disable.
